response.text:
COUNTER
rationale: Accept 0.3 kWh instead of 0.5 kWh to honor your critical need while preserving my 6-hour survival margin under conservative policy.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r2c3. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.3, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: r1c4 and r2c3 are in critical condition and must be supported, but my own SoC margin is now dangerously thin; I can only afford micro-shares to prevent cascading failure while preserving enough capacity to survive the remaining 6 hours..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
